title: ophrys × eliasii nothosubsp. conimbricensis
intro: Ophrys × eliasii nothosubsp. conimbricensis, also known as the Conimbriga Ophrys, is a hybrid orchid species that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ophrys × eliasii nothosubsp. conimbricensis are thought to include reduced inflammation and improved wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to support overall well-being, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
